title: Reading and Use of English - Part 4
description: For questions 25 – 30, complete the second sentence so that it has a similar meaning to the first sentence, using the word given. Do not change the word given. You must use between two and five words, including the word given. Here is an example (0).

example.firstSentence: They were installing new lights in the corridor.

questions.firstSentence: It isn't necessary for him to attend every meeting.
The traffic jam was so long that we missed our flight.
questions.secondSentence: It was (1) _________ that we missed our flight.

questions.firstSentence: She eventually succeeded in solving the problem.
Despite the setbacks, he kept trying.
questions.secondSentence: He kept trying (1) _________ there were setbacks.

questions.firstSentence: The last time she went abroad was three years ago.
He persuaded her not to quit her job.
